title: Everything Ice
description: This mod makes every block in Minecraft infintely slippery, like ice (but worse).
body:
# Everything Ice


This mod makes every block in minecraft infinitely slippery.
(Inspired by Fundy's video where he did the same thing)

This mod might break a little, when you just keep walking, because your velocity constantly increases, which can cause instability. (Try this on superflat and peaceful mode if you dare)

# More Fun

If you want to have more fun with your world, why not try out my new mod [Everything Slime](https://modrinth.com/mod/everythingslime) that makes all blocks bouncy? 


# Other Versions

It should support most major modding versions. If you need a specific version, just open the jar like a zip file, edit the fabric.mod.json to allow for whatever version you need it for. This should work for most versions
